_description: Reusable prompt fragments per asset class. Scripts pull these in and combine with the brand profile + user prompt. Edit to tune the default look for your org.

illustration.default_suffix: Flat geometric illustration, soft cream background, generous whitespace, 2-3 color limit using brand palette, no photorealism, modern editorial feel.

icon.default_suffix: Rounded line icon, 2px stroke, consistent corner radius 4px, 24x24 viewBox, centered on flat solid white background, no drop shadow, no text. Belongs to a matching set.
anti_patterns: gradient fills (unless brand profile uses gradients)

empty-state.default_suffix: Friendly illustration suitable for an empty-state screen. Single subject, large whitespace, brand-color accents. Conveys 'nothing here yet — and that's fine' without being patronizing.

hero.default_suffix: Hero illustration for the top of a landing page. Wide composition (16:9 or 21:9). High contrast. Clear focal point. Background calm enough that overlaid copy stays legible.
anti_patterns: centered subject with no copy room

social.default_suffix: Designed for square or vertical social posts (Instagram, LinkedIn, X). Bold composition, scroll-stopping color, copy-room reserved if a headline is needed.

video_intro.default_suffix: Cinematic intro, soft natural light, shallow depth of field, warm tone grading. 24fps feel. End on a calm beat suitable for a logo reveal.

voiceover.default_voice_traits: Warm, calm, mid-range pitch, friendly authority. Imagine a 40-something therapist who never raises their voice.
voiceover.delivery_notes: Natural pace (155 wpm), short sentences, slight pause after the brand name. Don't over-emote.
